hero.title: AfriKomics
hero.subtitle: Explore African-inspired stories through vivid characters, real values, and fun adventures designed for young readers.

stories.title: Anansi and the Talking Drum
stories.summary: Anansi discovers a magical drum that reveals hidden truths in his village. Every beat brings a lesson in honesty, courage, and teamwork.
stories.secondaryTitle: Kofi Tortoise and the Moonlight Market
stories.secondarySummary: When the Moonlight Market opens, clever Kofi Tortoise must follow one rule: take only what you can carry with honour. But greedy Hyena wants too much! Can Kofi Tortoise show everyone that sharing and keeping promises are the greatest treasures?

stories.title: The River Guardians of Volta
stories.summary: Three friends protect their river community from pollution and greed, using science and ancient wisdom to keep the waters alive.

stories.title: The Accra Sky Riders
stories.summary: A young inventor builds solar-powered gliders with her friends and takes on a citywide challenge to design a greener future.

comicStories.title: Anansi and the Talking Drum
comicStories.summary: At sunrise, Anansi hears a mysterious drum speaking in rhythms no one else can decode.

panels.speaker: Anansi
panels.text: That drum is calling my name. I can feel it in my chest!

panels.speaker: Kwesi
panels.text: My grandfather says the talking drum only speaks to those who tell the truth.

panels.speaker: Nana Efua
panels.text: Then listen carefully, children. The drum will guide you if your hearts are honest.

panels.speaker: Narrator
panels.text: As the rhythm grows stronger, Anansi and his friends begin a journey to uncover a hidden village secret.

comicStories.title: Anansi and the Talking Drum
comicStories.summary: The drum leads the children to an old baobab tree where hidden messages are carved in symbols.

panels.speaker: Kwesi
panels.text: I think the symbols are directions. This one points north to the market road.

panels.speaker: Anansi
panels.text: Then we follow it before sunset. The drum is warning us about something.

panels.speaker: Nana Efua
panels.text: Knowledge belongs to those who act with wisdom. Go, and return with truth.

comicStories.title: The River Guardians of Volta
comicStories.summary: A sudden change in the river color warns three friends that their water source is in danger.

panels.speaker: Ama
panels.text: Look at the water, it is darker than yesterday. Something is wrong upstream.

panels.speaker: Kofi
panels.text: If we map where this starts, we can prove who is polluting the river.

panels.speaker: Sena
panels.text: I brought test strips from school. Science first, then we confront them with facts.

panels.speaker: Narrator
panels.text: Their mission begins with courage, friendship, and a promise to protect every drop.

comicStories.title: Kofi Tortoise and the Moonlight Market
comicStories.summary: On a bright full moon night, Kofi Tortoise discovers a hidden market that appears only for honest hearts.

panels.speaker: Kofi Tortoise
panels.text: Those lanterns were not here at sunset. Where did this market come from?

panels.speaker: Abena
panels.text: Grandma says the moonlight market opens when people choose kindness over shortcuts.

panels.speaker: Auntie Esi
panels.text: Every trader here asks for one true answer before any bargain. Speak wisely, little ones.

comicStories.title: Kofi Tortoise and the Moonlight Market
comicStories.summary: Kofi learns that the rarest gift in the market is not sold with coins, but with fairness and patience.

panels.speaker: Abena
panels.text: We can rush and lose everything, or wait our turn and earn the moon seed.

panels.speaker: Kofi Tortoise
panels.text: Then we wait. A fair path may be slow, but it always carries us home.

panels.speaker: Narrator
panels.text: By dawn, Kofi leaves with a glowing seed and a bigger lesson: character is the true currency.

comicStories.title: The River Guardians of Volta
comicStories.summary: The friends track the source of pollution and discover illegal dumping near the old bridge.

panels.speaker: Sena
panels.text: The readings spike right here. This site is poisoning the river.

panels.speaker: Ama
panels.text: Take photos now. We need evidence before anyone clears this place.

panels.speaker: Kofi
panels.text: By morning, their report reaches community leaders and sparks a cleanup campaign.

comicStories.title: The Accra Sky Riders
comicStories.summary: In a buzzing city workshop, a young inventor tests a solar glider designed to clean the air.

panels.speaker: Zuri
panels.text: Panels charged. Wings steady. Today we fly for cleaner skies!

panels.speaker: Yaw
panels.text: Wind speed is perfect. Launch angle at twelve degrees and climbing.

panels.speaker: Adwoa
panels.text: If this works, we can power street lights and cooling hubs with the same design.

panels.speaker: Narrator
panels.text: Above Accra's rooftops, the Sky Riders prove that innovation can be both bold and kind to the planet.

comicStories.title: The Accra Sky Riders
comicStories.summary: A sudden storm forces the team to redesign their glider and test a safer emergency mode.

panels.speaker: Yaw
panels.text: The gusts are too strong. We need to switch to glide-safe mode now.

panels.speaker: Adwoa
panels.text: I can reroute the power to stabilizers. Give me ten seconds.

panels.speaker: Zuri
panels.text: They land safely, then rebuild stronger than before. Innovation wins again.
